subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that, through the blessings of the Most Great Name, the Kawthar of divine knowledge floweth forth and circulateth throughout all creation from the Fountainhead of the Pen of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بمبارکی اسم اعظم کوثر عرفان از معین قلم رحمن بین امکان جاری و ساریست
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @mystery of the great reversal, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
